Button color × style matrix

Every <Button> / <IconButton> in the app, mapped by colorScheme (color) × variant (style). Every color is now theme-driven — no raw Chakra palettes.

Rows are the Chakra variant (button style); columns are the colorScheme (color). Each cell lists the components using that combination. Buttons with no colorScheme resolve to the theme default brand (every shipped theme sets buttonColorScheme: "brand"), so they are folded into the brand column and marked d. theme-preview.tsx is excluded — it is a QA showcase that renders every cell dynamically.

brand — primary / affirmative success — accept / approve / confirm danger — reject / destroy / attention neutral — muted controls on dark media chrome
All four columns are theme-driven: brand / success / danger are semantic schemes; neutral is the theme's neutral scale. No red/green/blue/whiteAlpha/warning remain on any button.
variant ↓ / color → brand (+ default d) success danger neutral
solid
= no variant		 ShareContactCard · CreatePollModal · ChatBox (send) · PollCard (vote) · BlockContactButton (unblock) · profile · UpdateBanner (reload) · settings (backup-restore) · WelcomeInvited · CreateGroupModald · InviteMemberModald · GenerateInviteLinkModald · JoinRequestCardd · groups (create +4)d · settingsd · AvatarBrowserModal (selected) · contacts (hide-hidden toggle) ConfirmButton (UserCard → confirm contact · approve join request · make admin) · PendingConfirmationPrompt (confirm) · MemberList (make-admin confirm) · PendingInvitations (accept) · IncomingCallModal (accept) RejectButton (UserCard → MemberList) · BlockContactButton (block) · MemberList (remove / cancel-invite) · LeaveGroupButton · BackupReminderBanner · contacts (show-hidden toggle) · CallScreen (hang-up; mute / camera when off) · ManageInviteLinksModal (delete) · PollCard (confirm close) · settings (wipe / destructive) CallScreen (mute / camera idle · PiP)
outline BlockContactButton (archive) · NpubQrModal (copy) · profile (copy npub) · settings (×10 neutral actions) · groups · AvatarBrowserModal (unselected) · contacts (hide-hidden toggle) — LeaveGroupButton (leave) · IncomingCallModal (decline) · contacts (show-hidden toggle) · settings (reset / delete / wipe ×4) —
ghost CallToolbar (×4) · EmojiReactionPicker · EmojiComposerPicker · ChatBox (edit / delete) · CreatePollModal (×3) · ManageInviteLinksModal (cancel) · PendingInvitations (decline) · MemberList (view-profile + cancels ×3) · Generate / CreateGroup / InviteMember (cancel) · NpubQrButton · ImageAttachmentButton · PollCard / PollPanel · LeaveGroupButton (×2) · BlockContactButton (cancel) · info / add / imprint / feedback (back) · groups · profile (back) · settings (×8) · contacts (×3) — ChatBox (delete-confirm) · ManageInviteLinksModal (trash) · PollCard (close poll) · settings (remove theme) ImageLightbox (download / close)
link JoinRequestCard · InviteMemberModal (guidance) · groups · contacts — — —
unstyled Layout (mobile menu) — — —

CloseButton is a separate Chakra component with no variant/colorScheme: UpdateBanner · StorageWarning · ChatBox (×3) · OfflineBanner · BackupReminderBanner.

Companion: status badges

Status badges were moved onto the same theme schemes. They carry text labels, so where two states share a scheme the label still distinguishes them. warning lives here (a state), never on a button.

Badge colorScheme after the raw-palette purge.
schememeaningbadges
brandrole / identityMemberList (admin)
dangerdestructive-pendingMemberList (removal-pending)
warningawaiting / caution stateMemberList (invited-pending · join-requested) · contacts (pending) · GroupCard (near member limit)
neutralmuted / inactivecontacts (hidden) · profile (blocked) · theme-preview (non-stable status)

What changed

  • No warning buttons. warning is now a state colour only (badges + the GroupCard near-limit badge). The two former warning buttons — BackupReminderBanner and the contacts show-hidden toggle — were elevated to danger.
  • No raw Chakra palettes on buttons or badges. red → danger, green → success, blue → brand, whiteAlpha → neutral; badge purple → brand, yellow / blue → warning, orange → danger, gray → neutral. Every button and badge now re-themes with the active theme.
  • Affirmative family unified on success. The codified ConfirmButton category (confirm contact, approve join request, make admin) plus its two non-wrapper siblings (PendingConfirmationPrompt confirm, MemberList make-admin confirm dialog) moved from brand to success. Every accept/reject pair now reads green/red; brand is reserved for primary actions you initiate (create, send, submit, vote).
  • theme-preview updated. The button showcase now iterates brand · success · danger (warning removed, success added because accept buttons use it); the badge showcase uses neutral in place of gray.
Resolved: the previous split between semantic and raw-Chakra colours is gone — a destructive action reads as danger everywhere, an accept as success, and all of it restyles per theme. The one deliberate specialisation is neutral on the dark media overlays (call screen, image lightbox), where the theme's neutral scale stands in for the old translucent-white controls; icon legibility there is preserved by explicit color="white" (lightbox) and solid emoji glyphs (call screen).

Out of scope (follow-up)

This pass covered colorScheme on buttons and badges. A separate raw-palette surface remains in ad-hoc color= / bg= props (~40 sites): error/status text (red.500, green.500), muted announcement panels (gray.50), and dark-overlay chrome (blackAlpha/whiteAlpha/gray on the call screen). Many map to semantic tokens (dangerText, successText, textMuted); the dark-overlay ones are intentional. Convert as a distinct change if desired.

Generated from a static scan of app/src/** and app/pages/**. Reflects the working tree after the theme-colour consolidation. Re-derive from source if button usage changes.
